subcodes.first_line: O believers, O assured ones! Your faith and certitude at the threshold of the Lord God shineth even as the radiant moon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومنان ای موقنان ایمان و ایقانتان در آستان حضرت یزدان مانند مه تابان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort
